text:

1. Write tool to create files -> denied
2. Bash with heredoc to create files -> denied  
3. Bash mkdir to create directories -> denied
4. Bash pnpm add to install packages -> denied

Only read-only operations (Read, Glob, Grep) are working.

I have fully analyzed the codebase and know exactly what needs to be written for all 6 subtasks (2-A through 2-F). I am ready to execute the moment permissions are granted.

Options:

- Or manually approve each file operation when prompted

I will wait for permissions to be resolved before retrying.
